product_overview: DevVault is an enterprise-grade SaaS for secure storage and team collaboration around API keys and application secrets with a zero-knowledge, end-to-end encrypted architecture (see PRD pages 1-2 for overview, goals, architecture and key endpoints).
core_goals: Provide secure, end-to-end encrypted storage for API keys and secrets (Zero-Knowledge).
Enable team collaboration with multi-tenant organizations, projects and role-based permissions (OWNER, ADMIN, MEMBER, VIEWER).
Offer comprehensive audit logging for compliance and access tracking.
Expose a clear REST API for CI/CD and programmatic integration, plus subscription plan management.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Register and authenticate users to obtain JWT tokens used for subsequent API calls. Supports secure credentials and 2FA as described in PRD (page 1 security section).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/register with valid email and strong password -> Receive 201 Created with user id
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user's profile and membership context.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/users/me with JWT token in Authorization header -> Receive 200 with user profile and organization memberships (happy path)
GET /api/v1/users/me without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)

features.name: Organizations Management
features.description: List organizations the user belongs to and create new organizations to group projects and members.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/organizations with JWT token -> Receive 200 with array of organizations (happy path)
POST /api/v1/organizations with JWT token and valid organization payload -> Receive 201 Created with organization id (happy path)
POST /api/v1/organizations with JWT token but missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors (error path)
GET /api/v1/organizations with expired or invalid JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)

features.name: Projects Management
features.description: List projects within an organization to scope secrets and resources to a project.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects with JWT token and :orgId where user is a member -> Receive 200 with projects list (happy path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects with JWT token where user is not a member -> Receive 403 Forbidden (error path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects with JWT token and non-existent :orgId -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path)

features.name: Secrets Management
features.description: Store, retrieve and manage encrypted secrets for a project. The system follows zero-knowledge encryption: secrets are encrypted client-side before API calls (PRD pages 1-2).
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets with JWT token -> Receive 200 with list of secret metadata (values are encrypted) (happy path)
POST /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets with JWT token and encrypted secret payload -> Receive 201 Created with secret id (create happy path)
PUT /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets/:id with JWT token and updated encrypted payload -> Receive 200 OK with updated secret metadata (update happy path)
DELETE /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets/:id with JWT token -> Receive 204 No Content (delete happy path)
POST /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets with JWT token but invalid encrypted payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request (error path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets without JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)
PUT /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/projects/:projectId/secrets/:id with JWT token for non-existent secret id -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path)

features.name: Audit Logs
features.description: Retrieve access and activity logs for an organization to support compliance and forensics.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/audit with JWT token as an ADMIN or OWNER -> Receive 200 with paginated audit entries (happy path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/audit with JWT token as a MEMBER or VIEWER -> Receive 403 Forbidden (error path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/audit with malformed query params -> Receive 400 Bad Request (error path)

features.name: API Keys
features.description: List and manage programmatic API keys scoped to an organization for CI/CD and integrations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/api-keys with JWT token as OWNER or ADMIN -> Receive 200 with array of API keys (happy path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/api-keys with JWT token as MEMBER -> Receive 403 Forbidden (error path)
GET /api/v1/organizations/:orgId/api-keys with invalid orgId -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path)

features.name: Plans (Subscription & Billing)
features.description: Expose available subscription plans and billing-related metadata to authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/v1/plans with JWT token -> Receive 200 with available subscription plans (happy path)
GET /api/v1/plans with expired JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)

features.description: Create and manage organizations that group projects and users

endpoints.description: List organizations for the current user
